---
title: "Data Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec02-sp01"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec02"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this figure or chart and its importance._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.figure-interpretation}
**Figure Interpretation**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _The figure block below is enhanced with this guided analysis._]

**Key things to notice:**
- Key observation 1
- Key observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Deep-dive interpretation**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a detailed interpretation or analysis of what this figure shows._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set the scene for this interpretation task (e.g. 'Look closely at the figure below')._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.interpretation}
**Critical Interpretation**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Prompt the learner to interpret a specific figure, table, or output._]

**What to consider:**
- Observation 1
- Observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Expert Guidance**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add guidance or key things that should have been noticed._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the interpretation._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Data and Media Pages</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Video Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
